title: lithocarpus chiaratuangensis
intro: Lithocarpus chiaratuangensis, also known as the Chiangtung Lithocarpus, is a type of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion. Lithocarpus chiaratuangensis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried extract, and is also used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health conditions.
